key.name: ha-url
key.description: Base URL of the Home Assistant instance, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123

key.name: ha-token
key.description: Long-lived access token for authenticating with Home Assistant

key.name: ha-verify-ssl
key.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the Home Assistant instance

key.name: color-entities
key.description: Home Assistant entities to control with the color picker (up to 4)

key.name: color-selected
key.description: Currently selected entities for color control (empty = all selected)

key.name: color-service
key.description: Service to call for color changes, e.g. light.turn_on

key.name: color-attribute
key.description: Service data attribute for color, e.g. rgb_color

key.name: screen-sync-enabled
key.description: Periodically sample the screen and send the resulting RGB color to a Home Assistant light entity

key.name: screen-sync-entities
key.description: JSON array of {entity_id, enabled} objects for screen sync target lights

key.name: screen-sync-condition
key.description: Optional JSON object with {entity_id, operator, value} that must match before screen sync is active

key.name: screen-sync-interval
key.description: Seconds between screen color samples

key.name: screen-sync-mode
key.description: How to derive the color from sampled screen pixels: dominant, average, vibrant, accent, or backlight

key.name: screen-sync-scope
key.description: Monitor scope for screen color sampling: "primary" (primary monitor), "stage" (entire GNOME stage), "monitor-N" to target a specific display by zero-based index, or "browser" to use the Firefox Browser Bridge as color source

key.name: screen-sync-transition
key.description: Color interpolation mode between sampled frames: off, linear, ema, moving-average, catmull-rom, spring

key.name: screen-sync-output-interval
key.description: Milliseconds between interpolated color updates sent to Home Assistant

key.name: screen-sync-threshold
key.description: Minimum RGB distance before a newly interpolated color is sent to Home Assistant

key.name: screen-sync-history-size
key.description: History length used by the Moving Average and Catmull-Rom transition modes

key.name: screen-sync-ema-time
key.description: Approximate fade time in seconds for the EMA transition mode

key.name: screen-sync-spring-stiffness
key.description: Spring force used by the spring transition mode

key.name: screen-sync-spring-damping
key.description: Damping multiplier used by the spring transition mode

key.name: screen-sync-identify-request
key.description: Transient nonce written by the preferences dialog to trigger a monitor identification overlay in the shell extension

key.name: screen-sync-preview-request
key.description: Transient nonce used by the preferences dialog to request a preview sample from the shell extension

key.name: screen-sync-preview-response
key.description: Transient nonce written by the shell extension after finishing a preview sample

key.name: screen-sync-preview-dominant
key.description: Transient preview result for the dominant screen color as a hex string

key.name: screen-sync-preview-average
key.description: Transient preview result for the average screen color as a hex string

key.name: screen-sync-preview-vibrant
key.description: Transient preview result for the vibrant screen color as a hex string

key.name: screen-sync-preview-accent
key.description: Transient preview result for the accent screen color as a hex string

key.name: screen-sync-preview-backlight
key.description: Transient preview result for the backlight screen color as a hex string

key.name: screen-sync-preview-error
key.description: Transient preview error message written by the shell extension

key.name: browser-bridge-enabled
key.description: Startet einen lokalen WebSocket-Server, mit dem sich die HAControlPanel Firefox-Extension verbinden kann

key.name: browser-bridge-port
key.description: Lokaler Port auf dem der Browser Bridge WebSocket-Server lauscht

key.name: browser-bridge-mode
key.description: Verhalten wenn kein YouTube-Tab aktiv ist: "smart" (Fallback auf Screen-Sync) oder "yt-only" (letzte Farbe halten)

key.name: browser-bridge-tab
key.description: Ausgewählter YouTube-Tab: "auto" (immer der fokussierte Tab) oder eine Tab-ID als String

key.name: browser-bridge-tab-list
key.description: Transient: JSON-Array mit aktiven YouTube-Tabs [{tabId, title, active}], wird von der Extension gesetzt

key.name: browser-bridge-connected
key.description: Transient: true wenn mindestens eine Firefox-Extension verbunden ist, wird von der Extension gesetzt

key.name: browser-bridge-preview-color
key.description: Transient: zuletzt empfangene Farbe als Hex-String (#RRGGBB), wird von der Extension gesetzt (~1fps)

key.name: slider-entities-config
key.description: JSON array of slider entity configs: [{entity_id, service, attribute, min, max}]

key.name: slider-selected
key.description: Currently selected entities for slider control (empty = all selected)

key.name: button-count
key.description: How many action buttons to show in the panel menu

key.name: buttons-config
key.description: JSON array with button configurations (label, icon, entity_id, domain, service, service_data)

key.name: sensor-widgets-config
key.description: JSON array of sensor widget configs: [{entity_id, widget_type, attribute, unit_override, icon, min, max, severity, span}]

key.name: auto-yaml-backup
key.description: Automatically sync settings to a YAML file on every change

key.name: yaml-backup-path
key.description: Path where the YAML backup file is written
